    AbstractJSONMessageFormatter
    Base class for JSON message formatters.

    This JSONBadgerfishMessageFormatter is the formatter for "Badgerfish" formatted JSON in Axis2.

    This JSONMessageFormatter is the formatter for "Mapped" formatted JSON in Axis2.

  • Uses of MessageFormatter in org.apache.axis2.util

    Methods in org.apache.axis2.util that return MessageFormatter
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static MessageFormatter
    MessageProcessorSelector.getMessageFormatter(MessageContext msgContext)
    Initial work for a builder selector which selects the builder for a given message format based on the the content type of the recieved message. content-type to builder mapping can be specified through the Axis2.xml.
